composition_pattern: fill-cover -> replace-body-lines -> insert-two-support-pages -> delete-stale-page -> reorder-kept-pages -> rebuild-nested-outline
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Insert only the latest-upload exhibits, remove outdated duplicates, update the cover totals by request-list section, and build nested bookmarks that mirror the request-list hierarchy.
atomic_scope: Only the cover lines, body lines, inserted support pages, deleted stale page, final page order, and outline are required.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf artifact that completes the requested cross-document document operation.

notes.Task Notes:
- Preserve the image-bearing evidence pages
- Do not rebuild the packet as plain text pages
